opinions.text: Wherobots is Bringing Spatial Context to AI - SD Times Published: April 8th, 2026 - Wherobots is launching a set of features designed to make its powerful geospatial processing capabilities accessible to modern AI systems. Building on its core compute engine — the Wherobots DB, which processes two-dimensional data like map and trip information; and its raster flow tool, which handles aerial imagery data from satellites and drones — Wherobots is making these capabilities accessible to AI.
